Name: Venafi TPP - Export Certificate
Description:
This step template will authenticate against a Venafi TPP instance using an existing OAuth access token, and export a certificate using its Distinguished Name (DN). This is the absolute path to the certificate in the TPP instance.

This is achieved using the VenafiPS PowerShell module's [Export-VenafiCertificate](https://venafips.readthedocs.io/en/latest/functions/Export-VenafiCertificate/) function.

---

**Options:**

- Provide the distinguished name (DN) path to the certificate.
- Choose from the following export formats:
  - `Base64`
  - `Base64 (PKCS #8)`
  - `DER`
  - `JKS`
  - `PKCS #7`
  - `PKCS #12` 
- *Optional* - Provide a custom output path.
- *Optional* - Provide a custom output filename. If not supplied, the filename will automatically be taken from the response.
- *Optional* - Include the full certificate chain in the export.
- *Optional* - Friendly name (Label or alias) to use. Permitted with `Base64` and `PKCS #12` formats. Required when format is `JKS`.
- *Optional* - Include the private key in the export.
- *Optional* - Provide a password to be used for the exported private key.
- *Optional* - store the export certificate response in `JSON` format in an [Octopus sensitive output variable](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables#sensitive-output-variables). This output variable can then be used in additional deployment or runbook steps.
- *Optional* - on successful completion, you can revoke the access token used.

---

**Required:** 
- The `VenafiPS` PowerShell module installed on the deployment target or worker. If the module can't be found, the step will attempt to download a version from the [PowerShell gallery](https://www.powershellgallery.com/packages/VenafiPS).
- PowerShell `5` or greater.

Notes:

- Tested on Octopus `2021.2`.
- Tested with VenafiPS `3.1.5`.
- Tested with both Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Core on Linux.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.Server
Parameters.Label: Venafi TPP Server
Parameters.HelpText:
*Required*: The URL of the Venafi TPP instance you want to export a certificate from.

For example: `https://mytppserver.example.com`.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.AccessToken
Parameters.Label: Venafi TPP Access Token
Parameters.HelpText: *Required*: The access token to authenticate against the TPP instance.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.DNPath
Parameters.Label: Venafi TPP Certificate Path
Parameters.HelpText: *Required*: The Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate you wish to export. This is the absolute path to the certificate in the TPP instance, separated by `\`.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.Format
Parameters.Label: Certificate Export Format
Parameters.HelpText:
*Required*: The certificate export format. Valid options are:

- `Base64`
- `Base64 (PKCS #8)`
- `DER`
- `JKS`
- `PKCS #7`
- `PKCS #12`

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
Base64|Base64
Base64 (PKCS #8)|Base64 (PKCS #8)
DER|DER
JKS|JKS
PKCS #7|PKCS #7
PKCS #12|PKCS #12

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.OutPath
Parameters.Label: Certificate output folder (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: *Optional*: The folder path to save the certificate to. The folder must exist if this value is specified.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.OutFileName
Parameters.Label: Certificate output filename (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
*Optional*: The filename to save the exported certificate as. This value is used when the `Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.OutPath` parameter is set. 

If not specified, the TPP filename will be used.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.IncludeChain
Parameters.Label: Include certificate chain (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: *Optional*: Include the certificate chain with the exported certificate. Not supported with `DER` or `JKS` format. Default: `False`.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.FriendlyName
Parameters.Label: Friendly Name (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: *Optional*: Label or alias to use. Permitted with `Base64` and `PKCS #12` formats. Required when Format is `JKS`.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.IncludePrivateKey
Parameters.Label: Include Private Key (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: *Optional*: Include the private key in the certificate export. If this is selected, the `Venafi.TPP.Export.PrivateKeyPassword` must also be provided. Default: `False`.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.PrivateKeyPassword
Parameters.Label: Private Key password (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText:
*Optional*: The password required to include the private key. Not supported with `DER` or `PKCS #7` formats.  You must adhere to the following rules: 

- Password is at least 12 characters. 
- Comprised of at least three of the following: 
  - Uppercase alphabetic letters 
  - Lowercase alphabetic letters 
  - Numeric characters 
  - Special characters

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.OutputVariableName
Parameters.Label: Certificate output variable name (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: *Optional*: Create an output variable with the certificate details returned from the export call. The certificate details will be stored in `JSON` format.

Parameters.Name: Venafi.TPP.ExportCert.RevokeTokenOnCompletion
Parameters.Label: Revoke access token on completion?
Parameters.HelpText: Should the access token used be revoked once the step has been completed successfully? Default: `False`.
